form.formComment: Returns from a 43-day let-up. At the latest run sat on the pace before fading 9th of 11 at Wangaratta Bm66 on February 28 over 1170m, 7 len behind Greatham Boy carrying 59.5kg at $11. The start before that sat on the speed throughout before fading second last of 9 at Caulfield Bm70 on January 31 over 1000m, 7 len behind Castellar with 59kg at $101. Can do better and might be a surprise packet.
